Interface AsyncApi3xOperation

All Superinterfaces:
AsyncApiOperation, Node, Operation, Visitable
All Known Subinterfaces:
AsyncApi30Operation, AsyncApi31Operation
All Known Implementing Classes:
AsyncApi30OperationImpl, AsyncApi31OperationImpl
public interface AsyncApi3xOperation extends AsyncApiOperation
